title: Define OCX Properties
text: Define OCX Properties Define the OCX control to use as a widget in your Uniface applications. There are many OCX controls available from third parties or the public domain. For information on the properties, events and methods the OCX supports, refer to your OCX’s documentation. For more information, see uOcxContainer (OcxContainer) . Buttons Generate Signature —enable the calling of OCX’s methods in ProcScript. Load License —load the license information of the OCX and encapsulate it in the form component. Native —set the OCX’s native controls. How to Defining OCX Container Widgets Using OCX Controls in ProcScript Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
